how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Experience seamless vacation rentals on the blockchain
how_it_works.step1_desc: Link your Web3 wallet to get started. No email or lengthy sign-up process required.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Discover unique properties and book instantly with cryptocurrency. All transactions are transparent and secure.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Your payment is held in a smart contract escrow until check-in, protecting both travelers and hosts.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Earn Soulbound Tokens (SBTs) for completed stays and reviews, building your on-chain reputation.

why_nomadnodes.title: Why NomadNodes
why_nomadnodes.subtitle: The future of vacation rentals is decentralized
why_nomadnodes.feature1_desc: Direct peer-to-peer transactions mean lower fees and better rates for everyone.
why_nomadnodes.feature2_desc: Your data, reviews, and reputation belong to you through blockchain technology.
why_nomadnodes.feature3_desc: All transactions and reviews are recorded on-chain, ensuring complete transparency.
why_nomadnodes.feature4_desc: Accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies from anywhere in the world.
why_nomadnodes.feature5_desc: Build verifiable on-chain reputation through Soulbound Token achievements.
why_nomadnodes.feature6_desc: Automated payment protection with programmatic dispute resolution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about NomadNodes
faq.contact_text: We're here to help. Contact us anytime.

general.a1: NomadNodes is a decentralized vacation rental platform built on blockchain technology. We connect travelers directly with hosts, eliminating intermediaries and reducing fees while ensuring transparent, secure transactions.
general.q2: How is NomadNodes different from traditional platforms?
general.a2: Unlike traditional platforms, NomadNodes uses smart contracts for secure payments, Soulbound Tokens (SBT) for verified reviews, and operates with lower fees since there's no central intermediary taking a large cut.
general.q3: Do I need cryptocurrency to use NomadNodes?
general.a3: Yes, payments are made in USDC or EURC (stablecoins pegged to USD and EUR) on the Base blockchain. This ensures fast, low-cost transactions while maintaining price stability.

blockchain.q1: What is a wallet and why do I need one?
blockchain.a1: A crypto wallet (like MetaMask or Coinbase Wallet) is your digital identity on the blockchain. It lets you securely sign transactions and manage your funds without sharing personal information.
blockchain.a2: SBTs are non-transferable tokens that serve as your identity on the platform. You need a Traveler SBT or Host SBT (obtained during onboarding) to use NomadNodes. After completing stays, reviews are linked to your SBT, building your on-chain reputation.
blockchain.a3: Our smart contract escrow holds your payment securely until check-in is confirmed. This protects both travelers (funds are safe until arrival) and hosts (guaranteed payment for confirmed stays).
blockchain.a4: NomadNodes runs on Base, an Ethereum Layer 2 blockchain. This means fast transactions, low fees (usually less than $0.01), and the security of the Ethereum network.

booking.q1: How do I make a reservation?
booking.a1: First, connect your wallet and complete onboarding to get your Traveler SBT. Then browse properties, select your dates and room type, and confirm your booking. The payment is held in escrow until the host confirms your check-in.
booking.a2: We accept USDC and EURC stablecoins on the Base network. You can acquire them through exchanges like Coinbase or use a bridge from other networks.
booking.a3: Yes, cancellation policies vary by property. Check the specific property's cancellation terms before booking. Refunds are processed automatically through the smart contract.
booking.q4: How do I leave a review?
booking.a4: After your stay is completed, you can leave a verified review that is linked to your Traveler SBT. These reviews are permanently stored on-chain and cannot be faked since they prove you actually completed the stay.

hosting.q1: How do I become a host?
hosting.a1: Connect your wallet, get your Host SBT through our onboarding process, then create your first property listing. You can add multiple room types, photos, and set your own prices.
hosting.a2: We charge a 5% platform fee on completed bookings, significantly lower than traditional platforms (which often charge 15-20%). Hosts receive payments directly to their wallet.
hosting.a3: Payment is released from escrow when you confirm the guest's check-in, or automatically after check-out if not confirmed earlier. Funds go directly to your wallet.

security.a1: Absolutely. Payments are held in audited smart contracts, not by NomadNodes. Your funds are protected by blockchain security and only released according to the escrow rules.
security.a2: Yes! Unlike traditional platforms where fake reviews are common, our reviews are linked to Traveler SBTs and can only be submitted after completing a real stay. This ensures every review is genuine and verifiable on-chain.
security.a3: Our platform includes moderation tools for dispute resolution. Flagged reviews are reviewed by moderators, and our escrow system has safeguards for both parties.

chat.title: Need Help?
chat.subtitle: Find properties or get quick answers

questions.what_is_sbt: What is an SBT and why do I need one?
questions.how_to_book: How do I make a reservation?

answers.what_is_sbt: An SBT (Soulbound Token) is your digital identity on NomadNodes. You get one during onboarding - either a Traveler SBT to book stays or a Host SBT to list properties. It's non-transferable and builds your on-chain reputation through verified reviews.
answers.how_to_book: 1. Connect your wallet and complete onboarding to get your Traveler SBT. 2. Browse properties and select your dates. 3. Confirm your booking - payment is held in escrow until check-in is confirmed by the host.
answers.payment_methods: We accept USDC and EURC stablecoins on the Base network. These are stable cryptocurrencies pegged to USD and EUR, ensuring your payment value doesn't fluctuate.
answers.how_reviews_work: After completing a stay, you can leave a verified review that's linked to your Traveler SBT. These reviews are stored permanently on-chain and prove you actually stayed at the property - no fake reviews possible!

testimonials.title: What Our Community Says
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from travelers and hosts using NomadNodes

1.name: Alex M.
1.text: Finally a platform where I know the reviews are real! The blockchain verification gives me confidence when booking. Plus, the fees are way lower than traditional platforms.

2.name: Sarah L.
2.text: As a host, I love getting paid directly to my wallet. No waiting weeks for payouts. The escrow system protects both me and my guests. Game changer!

3.name: Marco T.
3.text: Being able to pay with stablecoins while traveling is incredible. No currency exchange fees, instant transactions, and my booking is secured by smart contracts.

testimonials.disclaimer: Illustrative testimonials - Real verified reviews coming soon on-chain
